sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW): Needham Maintains a Buy Rating
feed.summary: Needham has maintained a "Buy" rating on ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) with a price objective of $155.00, citing robust growth driven by healthy customer adoption of its Pro Plus modules, particularly Now Assist capabilities. The analyst highlighted the strong momentum in operating metrics and noted that the annual contract value for Now Assist exceeded $600 million. This positive outlook comes despite Truist recently reducing its price objective for ServiceNow, attributed to broader sectoral declines.

feed.title: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From CVS Health's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: CVS Health reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding analyst expectations in revenue, adjusted EPS, and EBITDA, driven by operational efficiency and successful integration of Rite Aid assets. The article highlights the top five analyst questions from the earnings call, covering topics such as Medicare Advantage rate impacts, FTC legislation, competitive outlook, commercial membership growth, and technology investment timing. These questions and management's responses offer insights into CVS's strategies and challenges moving forward.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials misses Q4 estimates as shares tumble 7%
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE:VMC) reported disappointing fourth-quarter results, missing analyst expectations for both adjusted earnings per share and revenue, leading to a 7% drop in its shares. Despite this, the company achieved strong full-year earnings growth for 2025 and anticipates continued strength in public construction activity for 2026. Vulcan also announced the divestiture of its non-core asphalt and ready-mixed concrete assets.

feed.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In On 3 Health Care Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
feed.summary: During volatile market conditions, dividend-yielding healthcare stocks like UnitedHealth Group, Viatris, and CVS Health can be attractive to investors due to their high free cash flows and regular payouts. This article highlights the ratings and price targets from top-performing analysts for these three companies. Analysts from Mizuho, Truist Securities, Piper Sandler, Barclays, B of A Securities, and JP Morgan have provided recent evaluations and price targets for these stocks, which each offer a dividend yield over 3%.

feed.title: Zions Bancorporation National Association UT Reduces Stock Holdings in UnitedHealth Group Incorporated $UNH
feed.summary: Zions Bancorporation National Association UT significantly reduced its stake in UnitedHealth Group (UNH) by 76.0% in Q3, selling 13,936 shares and retaining 4,401 shares valued at approximately $1.52 million. Despite this, other major institutions like Geode Capital Management and Dodge & Cox substantially increased their positions, leading to 87.86% institutional ownership of UNH. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $372.13, even as recent price targets have been trimmed.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Trims Holdings in Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) by 1.4% in the third quarter, selling over 531,000 shares but still owning 11.88% of the company, valued at approximately $5.89 billion. Despite this sale, analysts are largely bullish on Ross Stores, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $189.94, following strong Q3 earnings that surpassed expectations. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.405 per share.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 521,427 Shares of Marathon Petroleum Corporation $MPC
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Marathon Petroleum Corporation by 1.3% in the third quarter, selling 521,427 shares. Despite this, Vanguard still holds over 38 million shares valued at about $7.39 billion. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions, and Wall Street analysts currently give Marathon Petroleum a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $202.19.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Trims Stock Position in Fiserv, Inc. $FISV
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Fiserv, Inc. by 2.9% in the third quarter, selling over 1.4 million shares but still holding approximately 9.02% of the company worth $6.25 billion. Analyst sentiment for Fiserv has shifted to a "Hold" consensus with an average price target of $108.97, following several downgrades. Despite the share reduction and cautious analyst outlook, Fiserv reported strong quarterly earnings and issued favorable FY2026 guidance, while company insiders, including the CFO, purchased shares in December.

feed.title: Zions Bancorporation National Association UT Has $1.47 Million Position in Cintas Corporation $CTAS
feed.summary: Zions Bancorporation National Association UT significantly reduced its stake in Cintas Corporation, selling 47.4% of its shares but still holding 7,158 shares valued at $1.47 million. Cintas reported slightly better-than-expected earnings and revenue for the quarter, announced a $1 billion share buyback program, and maintains a quarterly dividend. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating for CTAS, with a consensus target price of $221.08.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Boosts Stock Holdings in Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Colgate-Palmolive Company by 0.2% in the third quarter, now owning over 82.9 million shares valued at about $6.63 billion. Colgate-Palmolive recently reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and offers a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share. Despite ongoing insider selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $94.38 for the company.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Increases Stock Position in Becton, Dickinson and Company $BDX
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. has increased its stake in Becton, Dickinson and Company (BDX) by 0.5% in the third quarter, now owning 32,455,790 shares valued at approximately $6.07 billion, representing 11.32% of the company. Despite beating quarterly earnings expectations with $2.91 EPS and $5.25 billion in revenue, Becton, Dickinson and Company provided conservative FY2026 guidance below analyst estimates. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $1.05 and authorized a $10 million share repurchase plan, while analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $195.46.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 66,097 Shares of Ameriprise Financial, Inc. $AMP
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Ameriprise Financial, Inc. by 0.5% in the third quarter, selling 66,097 shares and retaining ownership of 12,366,164 shares valued at approximately $6.075 billion. Insiders have also sold shares totaling $9.675 million in the past three months. Despite the institutional selling, Ameriprise reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and has a consensus analyst target price of $555.67 with an average "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Reduces Stock Holdings in HCA Healthcare, Inc. $HCA
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. decreased its stake in HCA Healthcare, Inc. by 3.8% in Q3, selling over half a million shares, though it still held 6.53% of the company. Despite Vanguard's reduction, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a $523.27 price target. HCA Healthcare reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing expectations, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Apple sell-off 'unwarranted,' as Wedbush says 2026 is the tech giant's year of AI (AAPL:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Wedbush Securities believes the recent sell-off of Apple stock is unwarranted, seeing 2026 as the year the tech giant firmly establishes its artificial intelligence presence. The firm estimates that AI monetization could add $75-$100 per share to Apple's value over several years, with factors like recent partnerships and management's focus on AI boosting confidence.

feed.title: QXO, Apollo Global, Thermo Fisher Scientific And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: This article highlights several "Final Trades" discussed on CNBC, featuring QXO, Apollo Global Management, Thermo Fisher Scientific, and the iShares US Consumer Discretionary ETF. Analysts offer their picks based on recent company news, earnings reports, and market performance. QXO's recent acquisition, Apollo Global's strong quarterly results, and Thermo Fisher Scientific's better-than-expected earnings were some of the driving factors behind the selections.

feed.title: Are Prediction Markets Telling Us Something? - Northern Trust - Commentaries
feed.summary: Carl Tannenbaum of Northern Trust explores the growing relevance of prediction markets, noting their expansion beyond traditional sports betting into areas like macroeconomics, monetary policy, and geopolitical events. He explains that these markets can serve as valuable analytic tools by aggregating diverse opinions and offering real-time insights, potentially outperforming traditional forecasting methods. While acknowledging the criticisms and novel aspects like cryptocurrency use, the article suggests that prediction markets merit consideration for their unique ability to synthesize information from independent participants.

feed.title: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan sees compensation rise following earnings growth
feed.summary: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan's compensation has increased, following strong earnings for the company and a 25% stock gain in 2025. The majority of his pay package is tied to future performance. The board's decision reflects the bank's successful financial year.

feed.title: Is Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) One of the 14 Best Cloud Computing Stocks to Buy Right Now?
feed.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) is listed among the best cloud computing stocks, despite a recent reduction in its price objective by a Bernstein analyst from $300 to $265. The company reported strong Q4 2025 results with a 14% net sales increase and a 24% YoY growth in its AWS segment. However, concerns remain regarding the high capital expenditure and weak Q1 2026 guidance, leading some to suggest other AI stocks offer greater upside.

feed.title: Patrick Dumont to take helm at Las Vegas Sands as CEO and chairman
feed.summary: Patrick Dumont is set to become the CEO and Chairman of Las Vegas Sands on March 1, 2026, succeeding Robert G. Goldstein, who will transition to a senior advisor role. Dumont, who has been with the company since 2010, will also chair Sands China Ltd. and continue to oversee significant development projects, including a major investment in Singapore and operations in Macao.

feed.title: General Mills Warns of Slumping Sales on Weak Consumer Sentiment
feed.summary: General Mills Inc. has lowered its fiscal 2026 sales outlook, revising its expectation for organic net sales to a decrease of 1.5% to 2% from an earlier forecast of a 1% decrease to a 1% increase. This adjustment is attributed to a more challenging consumer environment. The company, known for products like Cheerios, faces headwinds from weakening consumer sentiment.

feed.title: BofA Reinstates Coverage on MSCI with Buy Rating and $700 Target
feed.summary: Bank of America has reinstated coverage on MSCI (MSCI) with a Buy rating and a $700 price target, citing strong financial performance and a positive outlook for the Information and Business Services sector. MSCI, a key player in Capital Markets, showcases robust revenue growth, high profitability margins, and efficient return on equity. The valuation appears attractive, with technical indicators suggesting a potential buying opportunity, while financial health indicators like the Altman Z-Score and Piotroski F-Score indicate strength.

feed.title: Public comment hearing on PNM sale to Blackstone resumes
feed.summary: A public comment hearing is scheduled in Albuquerque for residents to share their thoughts on PNM's proposed $11.5 billion sale to Blackstone Infrastructure. The sale, filed last year by PNM's parent company, promises a 3.5% reduction in the average residential bill. The New Mexico Public Regulation Commission is hosting the in-person event, inviting residents to voice their concerns and feedback.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Buys 461,990 Shares of Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. $RCL
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. by 1.6%, purchasing 461,990 additional shares, bringing its total to over 30 million shares valued at approximately $9.73 billion. Royal Caribbean's board authorized a $2.0 billion share repurchase program and increased its quarterly dividend to $1.50 per share, reflecting management's confidence. The company reported strong Q3 earnings, with EPS of $2.80 and revenue of $4.26 billion, aligning with analyst expectations and contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $348.29.

feed.title: NVR, Inc. $NVR Shares Sold by Todd Asset Management LLC
feed.summary: Todd Asset Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in NVR, Inc. by 86% in the third quarter, selling 2,006 shares and retaining 326 shares valued at $2.62 million. This institutional selling coincides with recent insider sales totaling 920 shares worth $7.43 million by company directors and executives. Despite these sales, NVR reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a $750 million share buyback program.

feed.title: UBS Lifts PT on Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) Stock
feed.summary: UBS and JPMorgan have both raised their price targets for Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) to $95 from $90, maintaining "Buy" and "Overweight" ratings respectively. Analysts cited strong AI order momentum, improved revenue visibility for future fiscal years, and potential for upside to estimates due to accelerated revenue growth and a partnership with Nvidia for enterprise AI adoption. Cisco is recognized for its role in powering, securing, and drawing insights from the internet, offering data center switching, network security, and identity/access management technologies.

feed.title: Donnelley Financial Solutions (NYSE:DFIN) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.30 EPS
feed.summary: Donnelley Financial Solutions (NYSE:DFIN) announced its quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $0.70 against a projected $0.40, and reporting revenue of $172.50 million versus $155.27 million expected. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $61.50, despite mixed recent analyst actions including both upgrades and downgrades. Institutional investors hold a significant 93.84% stake in the company, which has a market cap of $1.04 billion.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) Misses Q4 CY2025 Revenue Estimates, Stock Drops
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) reported Q4 CY2025 revenue of $1.91 billion, missing analyst estimates, and an adjusted EPS of $1.70, significantly below expectations. The company also provided FY2026 EBITDA guidance below analyst consensus. Following these results, the stock price dropped by 7.6%.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Reduces PT on Snowflake Inc. (SNOW) Stock
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs recently reduced its price target on Snowflake Inc. (SNOW) stock to $246 from $286, maintaining a "Buy" rating based on anticipated strong fundamental resilience. Similarly, BofA also lowered its price objective to $275 from $310, though still highlighting it as a top pick in infrastructure software. This comes as Snowflake Inc. announced a $200 million partnership agreement with OpenAI to integrate advanced AI model capabilities for enterprise customers.

feed.title: This Energy Provider Wins Data-Center Deal With Oracle. The Stock Is Rising.
feed.summary: DTE Energy's stock rose significantly after the Michigan-based energy company secured a deal to provide 1.4 gigawatts of power for Oracle’s new data center in Saline Township, Michigan. This agreement is a major win for DTE Energy, highlighting its role in supporting the growth of large tech infrastructure.

feed.title: Applied Materials to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Applied Materials, Inc. announced that key members of its management team will participate in upcoming investor conferences in March 2026. Dr. Prabu Raja, President of the Semiconductor Products Group, will attend the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, while Brice Hill, Senior Vice President and CFO, will present at the Cantor Fitzgerald Global Technology & Industrial Growth Conference. Live audio webcasts and replays of these sessions will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: VULCAN MATERIALS ($VMC) Releases Q4 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: VULCAN MATERIALS ($VMC) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, missing both earnings per share and revenue estimates. The company reported EPS of $1.70 against an estimated $2.15, and revenue of $1.91 billion against an estimated $1.98 billion. The article also provides details on VMC's insider trading activity, hedge fund movements, analyst ratings, and price targets.

feed.title: Lunar New Year film 'Scare Out' sells $14.5M in tickets before debut
feed.summary: The Generation Essentials Group (TGE) announced that its Lunar New Year film, "Scare Out," has achieved over US$14.5 million in pre-sales, placing it among the top three holiday box-office forecasts. The movie's promotional campaigns generated significant social media engagement, with 5.40 billion total views and 2.72 billion views for its Douyin hashtag, ranking #1 on Weibo's movie list. "Scare Out" is set for a broad international release in major markets, including Greater China, North America, the UK, and Australia.

feed.title: Cytokinetics Announces European Commission Approval of MYQORZO® (aficamten) for the Treatment of Adults with Symptomatic Obstructive Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy
feed.summary: Cytokinetics announced that the European Commission (EC) has approved MYQORZO® (aficamten) for the treatment of symptomatic obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (oHCM) in adult patients. This approval is based on positive results from the SEQUOIA-HCM clinical trial, demonstrating significant improvements in exercise capacity and symptoms. The company plans its first European launch in Germany in Q2 2026, offering a new treatment option for patients with oHCM.

feed.title: New MYQORZO drug wins EU nod to treat symptomatic obstructive HCM
feed.summary: Cytokinetics has received European Commission approval for MYQORZO (aficamten) tablets to treat symptomatic obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (NYHA class II-III) in adults. The first European launch is planned for Germany in Q2 2026, with flexible dosing options. This approval follows prior FDA and China NMPA approvals, broadening the drug's global reach, and is based on positive results from the SEQUOIA-HCM Phase 3 clinical trial.

feed.title: Danaher reportedy nears $10B deal to buy Masimo
feed.summary: Danaher (NYSE: DHR) is reportedly close to acquiring Masimo (Nasdaq: MASI) in a deal valued at approximately $9.9 billion, with an announcement potentially coming as early as today, February 17, 2026. This acquisition would significantly expand Danaher's digital health and patient monitoring capabilities, adding Masimo's pulse oximeters and healthcare monitoring systems. The potential deal comes after a turbulent period for Masimo, including a CEO resignation, layoffs, a refocus on healthcare technology, and ongoing legal battles with Apple.

feed.title: Leidos misses quarterly revenue estimates on government shutdown impact
feed.summary: Defense contractor Leidos Holdings reported fourth-quarter revenue below Wall Street estimates, primarily due to the impact of last year's six-week long U.S. government shutdown. While revenue of $4.21 billion missed analyst estimates, the company's adjusted profit per share of $2.76 exceeded expectations due to core profit margin expansion and cost controls. Leidos also provided an adjusted profit forecast for 2026 that was slightly below analyst consensus.

feed.title: Qualcomm showcases Dragonwing IQ-10 Chip for humanoid robots at AI summit
feed.summary: Qualcomm unveiled its Dragonwing IQ-10 processor, specifically designed for robotics, at the India AI Impact Summit 2026 in New Delhi. The company demonstrated AI-powered humanoid robots, emphasizing a complete end-to-end robotics solution to accelerate the deployment of "physical AI" systems. Qualcomm is focusing on 10 priority tasks in logistics, manufacturing, and retail to speed up commercial adoption of these energy-efficient, modular robots.

feed.title: Medtronic slides after Q3 results on outlook (MDT:NYSE)
feed.summary: Medtronic (MDT) shares dropped after Q3 fiscal 2026 results despite beating revenue and EPS forecasts. The decline was attributed to the reaffirmation of an unchanged full-year earnings outlook that met consensus and a projected $185 million headwind from tariffs, which lowered EPS growth. The company reported strong performance in its Cardiovascular Portfolio and diabetes unit, with international markets also showing significant growth.

feed.title: US utility AEP sees large load pipeline swell by 28GW since October
feed.summary: American Electric Power (AEP) has seen its interconnection pipeline grow by an additional 28GW since October, with 80% of this increase attributed to large technology companies, bringing its total secured incremental demand to 56GW by 2030. The growth is primarily driven by hyperscale data center development in Texas, ERCOT, PJM Interconnection, and SPP markets. To address this demand, AEP is extending its capital investment plan and exploring off-grid power solutions like hydrogen fuel cells for expedited data center connections.

feed.title: Bear of the Day: Tractor Supply (TSCO)
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) is rated a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) due to pressures on the rural consumer and expected single-digit earnings growth. The company missed Q4 2025 earnings expectations and provided disappointing fiscal 2026 guidance, leading to analyst estimate cuts. Despite a dividend increase and share repurchase program, the stock is not considered cheap, trading at a 25.2 forward P/E, and investors are advised to wait for an improvement in earnings estimates.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】富蘭克林高收益債ETF宣布最新月配息，每股將發放0.131美元現金股利
feed.summary: |Franklin High Yield Corporate ETF (FLHY) has announced a monthly dividend of $0.131 per share. The ex-dividend and record dates are both February 2nd, with the payable date set for February 5th. This continues the ETF's policy of stable monthly cash distributions, allowing investors to plan their cash flow accordingly.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Increases Stock Position in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) by 50.3% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to $27.086 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the biopharmaceutical company. Regeneron recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Heartland Advisors Inc. Decreases Stake in Northern Trust Corporation $NTRS
feed.summary: Heartland Advisors Inc. reduced its stake in Northern Trust Corporation by 9.9% in the third quarter, selling 14,656 shares. Despite this, Northern Trust remains a significant holding for Heartland Advisors, accounting for 1.0% of its portfolio. Other institutional investors like Rothschild Investment LLC and Tobam increased their holdings, and the article also details recent insider selling, analyst price targets, and the company's financial performance.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK Shares Purchased by NEOS Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) by 39.9% in the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 347,684 shares valued at $29.18 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company. Insider selling by CFO Caroline Litchfield and CEO Robert M. Davis was also reported, alongside positive analyst ratings and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for MRK.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries, Inc. $MHK is Heartland Advisors Inc.'s 9th Largest Position
feed.summary: Heartland Advisors Inc. reduced its stake in Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) by 17.5% in the third quarter, making it their 9th largest holding. Other institutional investors like Atlas FRM LLC and ARGA Investment Management LP increased their positions significantly. Insiders have also sold shares, and Wall Street analysts currently rate the stock as a "Hold" with a consensus target price of $130.80.

feed.title: F5, Inc. $FFIV is Hotchkis & Wiley Capital Management LLC's Largest Position
feed.summary: Hotchkis & Wiley Capital Management LLC has maintained F5, Inc. ($FFIV) as its largest position, despite trimming its stake by 7.5%. The network technology company recently reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and provided positive Q2 and FY2026 guidance. However, F5 is facing a legal challenge with multiple law firms soliciting a securities class action related to alleged misleading information about BIG-IP security and an undetected hack.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Grows Stake in Fastenal Company $FAST
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) by 37.8% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 659,351 shares valued at $32.335 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Fastenal. The company recently reported quarterly earnings in line with expectations and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.24 per share.

feed.title: Heartland Advisors Inc. Sells 9,902 Shares of Essex Property Trust, Inc. $ESS
feed.summary: Heartland Advisors Inc. has reduced its stake in Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) by selling 9,902 shares, bringing their total holdings to 37,221 shares valued at approximately $9.96 million. This trimming of 21.0% occurred in the third quarter. Essex Property Trust recently reported Q4 earnings of $3.98 EPS, slightly missing estimates but beating revenue expectations, and offers a dividend yield of 4.1% with a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE:CNP) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.23
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE:CNP) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.23 per share, an increase of 4.5% from its previous payout. The dividend, representing an annualized $0.92 and a 2.2% yield, is payable on March 12 to shareholders of record on February 19. The company's dividend appears well-covered with a payout ratio of 48.9%, five consecutive years of increases, and analysts forecasting strong future earnings.

feed.title: DTE Energy beats fourth-quarter profit estimates on soaring power demand
feed.summary: DTE Energy (DTE) surpassed its fourth-quarter profit expectations, driven by a significant increase in power demand. This positive financial performance reflects strong operational results for the period. The news was reported by Reuters.
